issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases for storybook setup and testing.

scenarios.name: Button.stories.tsx with variants and interaction test
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses CSF named exports but omits args-driven controls, the autodocs tag, and a @storybook/test play function; treatment satisfies all four rubric checks.

scenarios.name: Visual regression and a11y in CI
scenarios.rationale: Baseline rolls a generic Playwright job; treatment uses @storybook/test-runner, @storybook/addon-a11y, and Chromatic exactly as documented.
